flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at El Paso Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.3k → $6.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at El Paso Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.3k → $4.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at El Paso Community College rose 32% between 2006 and 2009 (7.1% → 9.4%).
